reviews.review_description: you know what i'm saying you gotta have more people if it was multiplayer i played a lot more single user playing at as much because it doesn't have multiplayer and it's not more players than just you yourself

Not like other gag knockoffs this game saves your stuff plus the even do events unlike all the gag games the one has gear shop and the even made their own seed like the low taper fade blossom AND SO MUCH MORE really fun highly recommend downloading it

Ok so this game has some pros and cons lets go over it (quick side note i am a mod but ill try to be as unbiased as possible)

pros: lots of seeds
update around everyweek
great community with awsome ppl

cons: seeds sometimes dissaper
Single player (prob forever)
some minor bugs 

That's my review thank for you time - tex

Good game, but please add multiplayer￼ But I also recommend downloading it￼ Excited for future updates￼




Stealing other players fruits would be fun￼ hehe
🍪

developer_response.body: When I originally started making the game I tried to add multiplayer but it didn't end up working out. It's disappointing that it didn't work out but if I tried for too long the game wouldn't exist! Also thanks for the support!

reviews.review_description: The only problem that there is sometimes when you teleport it flings you, you get flung into the water but other than that, the game is amazing and good for people that have bad Internet. Should also add actual inventory system and sell all

Honestly, this game surprised me. It’s basically like Grow a Garden but in VR, and it’s way more fun than I expected Watching your crops grow and then upgrading to better seeds is really satisfying, and I lost track of time just messing around with different plants. If you like chill farming games, this one’s totally worth it.

reviews.review_title: Ok i understand it’s kinda hard to do it
reviews.review_description: Ik you ain’t the best game dev, but definitely a super great game, but i can give some ideas how to do it, so basically make something of like a base weight and price, lets say alpha seed base weight is 8kg, base price what it is, make a minimum weight cap, like 6kg, and then add a chance for it to have like a 60kg weight what would be like I don’t know 17k?, sprinklers, hmmm… you can make it so like they make plants grow bigger like 3 or 4 times(first add the 3 sprinklers then master to avoid inflation of shekels like gag roblox), i’ve seen some basic models of it in vr, then the beanstalk cactus etc., i think u can just do alot of cubes rotated a bit with an arrow like leaf, and beanstalk fruit, a hollow rectangle with spheres, i hope you do well, this game deserves a 5 star rating in total, oh and mutations, golden 1 in 200, rainbow 1 in 1000, good luck!

developer_response.body: Im so sorry i responded late. I haven't added sprinklers, weight, mutations, etc... because im not the best game dev and this is my first public game. Also multiplayer is VERY difficult to add, if you do a little bit of research its more than just a few buttons.

reviews.review_description:
I love this game. It is just so sad I won't be able to give anything to my brother. I would love multiplayer  and  it would probably be a better game than gtag if they add textures and a better way to get up from the river...

Oh and...

ADD MULTIPLAYER AND TEXTURES TO THE GROUNDS. AND A BETTER TELEPORTING SYSTEM.(I get stuck when there's something is in the way. E.g. a fence). Would be 5 star if multiplayer was a thing!!

This game is so fun, it keeps me playing for hours! Super awesome game! (but no multiplayer so -4 stars)

The map, the game, the plants, they are all hosted no questions asked it does save weirdly tho my plants all disappear but the seed are there to me it makes no sense but add multiplayer more fruits and a player model and this game will get a lot better
I love this game and spent so much time on it I eventually got the beta berries however the only thing i can't wait for is multiplayer, keep up the good work and please add multiplayer

reviews.review_title: Best game in vr very fun
reviews.review_description: Very fun game but should a a public feature and an inventory to the game and it will be even better .

developer_response.body: I tried to originally add multiplayer to the game but it didn't work out. For the inventory I wanted to make something more interactive so I made it the backpack gear instead of a ui!
